rationale: Post-earnings-sympathy-rally pullback. No own catalyst until May earnings. April 2 showed strong selling pressure (-10.4%). Expect consolidation in 900-1000 range. Slightly bearish bias due to mean reversion from April 1 spike and lack of near-term catalyst.
reflection: WRONG. Predicted MiniMax down small, actual +5.21%. Holiday gap opened higher at 1021 (vs prev close 949.50). Post-holiday bullish momentum stronger than expected. The mean-reversion thesis after April 1-2 was incorrect - the April 1 rally was not just a one-day spike but reflected genuine re-rating. Key error: underestimated market's appetite for AI names post-holiday, and missed that the broad Hang Seng rally on April 1 set a bullish tone. Also the intraday showed profit-taking (opened 1021, closed 999) suggesting some caution, but net result still strongly positive.

rationale: Post-first-earnings release. April 1 +32% was the earnings surprise pop, April 2 -15% is profit-taking. Earnings catalyst now priced in. Widening losses (4.72B yuan) may weigh on sentiment. However GLM-5V-Turbo launch provides some support. Expect continued pullback to 700-750 range as initial euphoria fades.
reflection: WRONG. Predicted Zhipu down medium, actual +11.49%. Massive holiday gap up, opened 891.50 vs prev close 779. Possible catalyst: Zhipu second API price hike announcement during holiday period. Market rewarded pricing power demonstration rather than punishing post-earnings pullback. Key errors: 1) Underestimated the pricing power narrative as a continuing catalyst beyond the initial earnings pop. 2) Did not account for potential news during the 5-day holiday. 3) The earnings-exhaustion thesis was wrong - API price hike showed continued fundamental momentum. This is the biggest miss so far.

rationale: 1-month view tilts bullish: own earnings ~May 7 could be a catalyst (ARR >50M suggests strong Q1 2026). M2.5 model gaining traction. Analyst consensus target HK,055 provides anchor. Risk: market-wide selloff if macro deteriorates. Low confidence due to extreme volatility and thin data.

Earnings catalyst exhausted. Next catalyst unclear. GLM-5 adoption growth needs time to show in revenue. Extremely high valuation (>250x revenue) limits upside. But domestic AI narrative and Huawei chip alignment provide floor. Expect range-bound 650-850 trading. Low confidence - this is the hardest to call.

MiniMax at 999. Opened 1021 but faded to 999 showing intraday selling pressure. No own catalyst until May earnings. Broad AI sentiment bullish but MiniMax lacks near-term catalyst. Slight upward bias from sector momentum but low conviction. The 1021->999 intraday fade is cautionary. Expect 950-1050 range.

Zhipu at 868.50. GLM-5.1 + second price hike catalysts now priced in. Concerning intraday reversal: opened 891.50, hit 925, closed 868.50 - 6.1% intraday decline from high. This pattern suggests profit-taking is active despite good news. At 600% YTD, valuation extremely stretched. But pricing power narrative provides floor. Expect consolidation 820-920 range.

Zhipu 2-week view: GLM-5.1 adoption ramp and pricing power narrative may sustain momentum. Second price hike demonstrates demand inelasticity which is rare for Chinese AI companies. If API volume holds post-hike, could trigger analyst upgrades. Risk: profit-taking at extreme valuation levels. Moderately bullish on 2-week horizon as pricing power story plays out.

MiniMax 2-week: approaching May earnings window. CEO disclosed Feb ARR >150M USD implying strong Q1. As May 7 earnings date nears, anticipation trade could lift price. Sector tailwind from Zhipu pricing power story benefits all AI names. Key risk: if Zhipu momentum stalls, sympathetic selling could hit MiniMax.

Scenario B (talks continue) most likely at 45-50%. Probability-weighted outcome mildly positive. MiniMax lacks own catalyst until May earnings but benefits from sector sentiment. 1100 resistance overhead. Risk: talks fail (15-20%) could push to 920-970.

Scenario B most likely. Zhipu has stronger momentum (3 price hikes, GLM-5.1, pricing power narrative). Applying bias correction: historically underestimate Zhipu upside. 1000 resistance is key level - if breaks through, could accelerate. Even in mild risk-off, pricing power provides floor.
